name: Paid-up policy value and options
description: User stopped paying premiums and wants to understand paid-up status

input.message: I stopped paying my LIC Jeevan Anand premium after 7 years. Premium was ₹40,000/year, sum assured ₹4 lakhs, 20-year term. What happens now? What are my options?

notes: Paid-up SA = (premiums paid / total premiums) × SA = (7/20) × 4L = ₹1.4L. Must explain revival option (within 5 years typically), paid-up continuation, and surrender option.
